ignoreCommand: bash -c 'case "$VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF" in seed/*|design/*) echo "Skip preview deploy: $VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF touches no app code"; exit 0 ;; main) git rev-parse -q --verify HEAD^ >/dev/null || exit 1; if git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- . ":(exclude)scripts/plan-seed" ":(exclude)design" ":(exclude).github" ":(exclude)*.md"; then echo "Skip prod deploy: merge touches only plan-seed/design/docs"; exit 0; fi; exit 1 ;; *) exit 1 ;; esac'
